## Implementation Summary

**What was built:** A complete Jest + TypeScript test suite for `processRefund` covering all 7 Bird acceptance criteria across 16 individual test cases, co-located with the implementation in `.tmp/`.

**Approach:** Each AC maps to its own `describe` block (named `AC[N] – <plain-english description>`), matching the pattern established in existing `.tmp/` test files (e.g. `processPayment.test.ts`).
